info.name: AMR Data Portal
info.description: AMR Data Portal API collection with response validation tests. Set the `amr_current` collection variable (e.g. `localhost:8000`).

request.description: Lightweight health check — verifies the API process is serving requests.
Returns the current AMR data release label shown in the UI and exports.
Filter categories, views, grouped categories, and embedded release metadata.
